mapper.select: SELECT place_id AS placeId, title, first_image AS firstImage, addr1, mapx, mapy, like_count AS likeCount FROM place WHERE place_type = #{placeType} AND title = #{title}
SELECT place_id AS placeId, title, first_image AS firstImage, addr1, mapx, mapy, like_count AS likeCount FROM place WHERE place_type = #{placetype} AND lclssystm3 = #{lclssystm3}
SELECT place_id AS placeId, title, first_image AS firstImage, addr1, mapx, mapy, like_count AS likeCount FROM place WHERE place_type = #{placeType} ORDER BY like_count DESC
